title: Celebrity-Related Tour March 2026
shortDescription: An exclusive celebrity-related fan experience in Chennai. Visit movie-related locations, renowned film studios, and enjoy sessions with industry insiders for a unique look into South Indian cinema.
longDescription:
Step into the glamorous world of South Indian cinema with our flagship Celebrity-Related Tour. Across five unforgettable days in and around Chennai, you will move beyond the silver screen and into the very heart of the industry. From visiting iconic film studio areas to participating in sessions with cinema critics and industry staff, every moment is crafted to give you a deep perspective that no ordinary tourist ever gets.

Our small-group format ensures a premium, personal experience. A dedicated Japanese-speaking guide accompanies you from arrival to departure, managing every logistics detail so you can focus entirely on the experience.
features: Dining session with local cinema critics

itinerary.title: Arrival & Welcome in Chennai
itinerary.details: Airport pickup and transfer to your luxury hotel. Evening welcome dinner at a rooftop restaurant overlooking Marina Beach. Meet your Japanese guide and co-travellers.

itinerary.title: Studio Access & Live Set Walk
itinerary.details: Private behind-the-scenes tour of a major Chennai film studio. Watch live shooting in progress and explore costume, prop, and editing departments. Lunch with the production crew.

itinerary.title: Celebrity-Related Fan Session
itinerary.details: The centrepiece of the tour. A structured session at a celebrity-related location or with industry staff. Learn behind-the-scenes stories, participate in Q&A, and receive a special souvenir from us included.

itinerary.title: Polichoalur Village & Local Culture
itinerary.details: Day trip to the historic weaving village of Polichoalur. Traditional silk weaving demonstration, local lunch, and an evening Bharatanatyam cultural performance.

itinerary.title: Farewell & Departure
itinerary.details: Free morning for last-minute shopping at T. Nagar and Pondy Bazaar. Farewell lunch at a renowned local restaurant. Transfer to Chennai International Airport.

whatToExpect: Fully guided 5-day journey with a Japanese-speaking escort
Small group of maximum 8 participants for a premium experience
Both tourist highlights AND deeply exclusive insider access
All cultural moments interpreted and explained in Japanese
24/7 emergency support from our Chennai base team
inclusions: All studio entry and fan session fees
Local transport in an air-conditioned van

faq.question: Is Japanese language support available throughout?
faq.answer: Yes. A dedicated Japanese-speaking guide accompanies the group every day throughout the tour.

faq.question: How are the guest sessions confirmed?
faq.answer: We confirm the industry guest or featured location 2–3 weeks before departure and notify all participants immediately. Availability can occasionally change due to filming or industry schedules.

faq.question: Is this tour suitable for solo female travellers?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Our tours are specifically designed with Japanese solo travellers in mind, with a strong emphasis on safety and group cohesion.

faq.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faq.answer: Full refund if cancelled 30+ days before departure. 50% refund 15–29 days before. No refund within 14 days.

title: Food Tour April 2026
shortDescription: A 7-day culinary odyssey through Hyderabad that takes you deep into the city's legendary food culture — from the world-famous Biryani to royal Nizam banquets and historic Irani cafés.
longDescription:
Hyderabad is one of the world's true food capitals, and this tour gives you the keys to its kitchen. Over seven rich days you will master traditional Hyderabadi Dum Biryani in a hands-on cooking workshop, dine in the restored palaces of the Nizam era, and navigate the centuries-old alleyways of the Old City sampling Irani Chai and Osmania biscuits.

This is not a simple restaurant tour. You will meet the families who have guarded secret recipes for generations, visit the spice merchants of Laad Bazaar, and understand why Hyderabadi cuisine is considered the ultimate fusion of Mughal and South Indian flavour traditions.
features: Irani Chai & food trail through Old City

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hyderabad
itinerary.details: Airport welcome, hotel check-in, and an introductory walk through Secunderabad food market with your guide.

itinerary.title: Biryani Masterclass
itinerary.details: Full-day hands-on Dum Biryani cooking workshop with a professional Hyderabadi chef. Learn grinding spices, layering, and slow-cooking techniques.

itinerary.title: Charminar & Old City Food Trail
itinerary.details: Walking food trail through the Old City — Haleem, Paya, kebabs, Irani cafés, and Osmania biscuits with curated tasting stops.

itinerary.title: Nizam Royal Dining
itinerary.details: An exclusive royal dinner experience in a restored Nizam-era palace, featuring 12-course authentic Hyderabadi cuisine.

itinerary.title: Spice Market & Home Kitchen Visit
itinerary.details: Morning at Laad Bazaar spice market with a guide. Afternoon visit to a traditional Hyderabadi family home for a private cooking demonstration.

itinerary.title: Modern Hyderabad Food Scene
itinerary.details: Explore the modern café culture and fusion restaurants of Banjara Hills and Jubilee Hills — a study in how the city's food is evolving.

itinerary.title: Farewell & Departure
itinerary.details: Morning visit to a local sweet shop to pack traditional mithai as gifts. Farewell lunch. Transfer to Rajiv Gandhi International Airport.

whatToExpect: Hands-on cooking with professional local chefs
7 curated food experiences — not just restaurants
Access to family-run kitchens not open to the public
Full Japanese language support throughout
All tastings and workshop ingredients included
inclusions: All breakfasts and all listed dining experiences
Workshop materials and recipe cards in Japanese
exclusions: Any food not listed in the daily programme

faq.question: Do I need cooking experience?
faq.answer: None at all! Our workshops are designed for beginners and each step is guided in both English and Japanese.

faq.question: Can dietary restrictions be accommodated?
faq.answer: Yes. Please notify us at booking. Vegetarian, gluten-aware, and allergen-conscious menus can be arranged.

title: Cultural Tour June 2026
shortDescription: An 8-day deep dive into the temples, art, and sacred traditions of Tamil Nadu — featuring private after-hours temple access, live classical Bharatanatyam, and UNESCO World Heritage sites.
longDescription:
Tamil Nadu is one of humanity's oldest living civilisations, and this tour is your intimate introduction to it. Over eight carefully paced days you will stand inside the Meenakshi Amman Temple in Madurai as a private guide brings its thousand-year history to life, photograph the Shore Temple at Mamallapuram in the golden hour, and witness — or even participate in — a live classical Bharatanatyam dance performance.

This is the tour for travellers who want to go beyond sightseeing. Every day has been designed to create a genuine cultural encounter, not just a visit.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Madurai
itinerary.details: Arrive at Madurai Airport, transfer to heritage hotel. Evening rooftop viewing of the Meenakshi Temple illuminated at dusk.

itinerary.title: Meenakshi Amman Temple — Private Tour
itinerary.details: Early-morning private architectural tour of the Meenakshi Temple with a specialist historian guide. Explore the Hall of a Thousand Pillars and the temple tank.

itinerary.title: Madurai Old City Walk & Craft
itinerary.details: Walking tour of Madurai's bazaars — silk, bronze, and flower markets. Afternoon traditional bronze-casting workshop.

itinerary.title: Travel to Thanjavur
itinerary.details: Morning drive to Thanjavur. Visit Brihadeeswarar Temple (UNESCO), the Royal Palace Museum, and the ancient Saraswathi Mahal Library.

itinerary.title: Bharatanatyam — Live Performance & Intro Workshop
itinerary.details: Afternoon private Bharatanatyam performance in a traditional sabha. Optional 90-minute introduction workshop for participants interested in learning basic mudras.

itinerary.title: Travel to Mamallapuram
itinerary.details: Drive to Mamallapuram along the Coromandel Coast. Arrive at sunset. Check in to beachfront hotel.

itinerary.title: UNESCO Heritage Sites — Photography Workshop
itinerary.details: Guided photography workshop at Shore Temple, Five Rathas, and Arjuna's Penance. Professional photographer guide included. Small print of your best shot gifted.

itinerary.title: Farewell & Departure
itinerary.details: Morning beach walk. Farewell brunch. Transfer to Chennai International Airport for onward travel.

whatToExpect: Private access to sites before regular tourist hours
Specialist heritage guides at every major site
A professional photographer guide at Mamallapuram
Optional participation in classical dance workshop
Balanced pace — cultural depth without exhaustion
inclusions: All internal transfers by air-conditioned van
All entry fees to temples and UNESCO sites
exclusions: Lunches not listed in the programme

faq.question: Is there a lot of walking involved?
faq.answer: Yes — the Meenakshi Temple and Mamallapuram sites involve moderate walking on uneven surfaces. Comfortable shoes are strongly recommended.

faq.question: Are religious sites respectful of non-Hindu visitors?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Your guide will brief you on temple etiquette (footwear, dress, photography rules) before every visit.

faq.question: Only 2 seats left — can I book for a group of 4?
faq.answer: Please contact us directly. We may be able to arrange a private group departure or reserve seats on our next cultural tour.

title: Celebrity Tour December 2025
shortDescription: A landmark 10-day fan journey through Chennai and Madurai — featuring exclusive star meet-and-greets, temple city experiences, and the magical Pongal countdown atmosphere of Tamil Nadu.
longDescription:
December in Tamil Nadu is an extraordinary time to be a film fan. As the state gears up for the festive season, the film industry buzzes with premieres, press events, and charity galas — making it the perfect moment for our most ambitious celebrity tour to date.

Over ten carefully curated days, you will divide your time between Chennai, India's film capital for Tamil cinema, and the ancient temple city of Madurai. In Chennai you will access live film sets, attend a private screening of an upcoming release, and enjoy a personal interaction session with a confirmed Tamil star. In Madurai, the atmosphere shifts to one of deep spiritual culture as the city prepares its legendary December Music and Dance Festival.

This tour is limited to just 8 participants to ensure every experience remains intimate, personal, and unforgettable.
features: Exclusive star meet-and-greet with confirmed Tamil celebrity
Live film set access and private screening
December Music & Dance Festival in Madurai

itinerary.title: Arrival in Chennai
itinerary.details: Welcome at Chennai International Airport. Transfer to your 5-star hotel on ECR. Evening orientation walk along Marina Beach — the world's second longest urban beach — and a welcome dinner with your guide.

itinerary.title: Film Studio Immersion
itinerary.details: Full-day tour of a major Chennai film studio. Visit the costume atelier, prop department, and observe a live shoot in progress. Lunch with production staff and a behind-the-scenes briefing on how Tamil blockbusters are made.

itinerary.title: Celebrity Meet & Greet
itinerary.details: The signature moment of the tour. A private, structured interaction session with a confirmed Tamil film star — including a Q&A, personal photo opportunity, and exclusive signed memorabilia prepared by our team.

itinerary.title: Private Film Screening
itinerary.details: Attend a private pre-release screening of an upcoming Tamil film, arranged exclusively for our group. Post-screening discussion with a member of the crew.

itinerary.title: Chennai Cultural Day
itinerary.details: Morning visit to Kapaleeshwarar Temple in Mylapore, followed by a silk saree weaving demonstration at a traditional workshop. Afternoon free to explore T. Nagar shopping district.

itinerary.title: Journey to Madurai
itinerary.details: Morning scenic drive south to the ancient temple city of Madurai. Arrive by noon, check into a heritage hotel. Evening visit to the Meenakshi Amman Temple for the spectacular evening prayer ceremony.

itinerary.title: Meenakshi Temple Deep Dive
itinerary.details: Private guided architectural tour of the Meenakshi Temple complex with a specialist historian. Explore the Hall of a Thousand Pillars, the sacred tank, and the temple museum — with full Japanese interpretation provided.

itinerary.title: December Festival Experience
itinerary.details: Attend a curated selection of performances from the Madurai December Music and Dance Festival — featuring Bharatanatyam, Carnatic music, and traditional Nadhaswaram recitals. A rare cultural privilege.

itinerary.title: Madurai Heritage & Farewell Dinner
itinerary.details: Morning visit to the Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace. Afternoon at leisure. Evening grand farewell dinner at a rooftop venue overlooking the Meenakshi Temple gopurams lit up at night.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.details: Morning transfer to Madurai Airport or back to Chennai International for onward flights. Our guide accompanies you to the airport for a personal farewell.

whatToExpect: 10 days of immersive celebrity and cultural experiences
Private star interaction with a confirmed Tamil film celebrity
Live film set access and private pre-release screening
Attendance at the legendary Madurai December Music Festival
Full Japanese-speaking escort for all 10 days
Small group of maximum 8 — a truly boutique experience
inclusions: Return airport transfers (Chennai in, Madurai out)
9 nights accommodation (5-star in Chennai, heritage in Madurai)
All breakfasts and 5 curated group dinners
All studio, temple, and festival entry fees
Celebrity session fee and signed memorabilia

faq.question: Is this tour still available to book?
faq.answer: This tour has already taken place in December 2025 and is now fully completed. Please browse our upcoming tours for future departures.

faq.question: Which celebrity was featured?
faq.answer: Celebrity details for past tours are kept confidential to protect the privacy of our guests and the stars involved. Photos from the tour are available in our gallery.

faq.question: Will there be a similar tour in 2026?
faq.answer: Yes! Watch for our Celebrity Tour March 2026 which follows a similar format in Chennai. Seats are limited — book early.

title: Chennai Weekend Explorer
shortDescription: A compact 2-day tour of Chennai covering Marina Beach, Kapaleeshwarar Temple, and authentic South Indian cuisine.
longDescription: Not everyone has a full week to spare, and that is exactly why we created this focused weekend tour of Chennai. In just two days you will experience the city's most iconic highlights — from the historic Mylapore neighbourhood to the vibrant colours of Marina Beach at sunrise.
features: T. Nagar shopping with local guide

itinerary.title: Arrival & Chennai Highlights
itinerary.details: Morning arrival and transfer. Visit Kapaleeshwarar Temple and explore T. Nagar. Evening Marina Beach sunset walk.

itinerary.title: Culture & Departure
itinerary.details: Early-morning Marina Beach sunrise. Visit the Government Museum. Farewell brunch and transfer to airport.

whatToExpect: Compact 2-day itinerary
Japanese-speaking guide
Authentic local food

title: Madurai Temple Express
shortDescription: A focused 2-day pilgrimage and cultural tour of Madurai.
longDescription: Madurai is one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world. This short tour is designed for travellers who want to experience the spiritual and cultural heart of Tamil Nadu without committing to a week-long journey.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Temple Immersion
itinerary.details: Arrive at Madurai Airport. Afternoon guided tour of Meenakshi Amman Temple. Evening ceremony viewing.

itinerary.title: Bazaars & Departure
itinerary.details: Morning flower and banana markets. Visit Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace. Transfer to airport.

whatToExpect: Expert historian guide
Japanese interpretation

title: Hyderabad Heritage Quick Tour
shortDescription: A 1-day intensive tour of Hyderabad's most iconic landmarks.
longDescription: Hyderabad packs centuries of royal history into a single, vibrant city. This one-day intensive tour is perfect for transit travellers.

itinerary.title: Full-Day Hyderabad Highlights
itinerary.details: Morning pickup. Visit Charminar and Laad Bazaar. Authentic Biryani lunch. Afternoon tour of Golconda Fort. Evening drop-off.

whatToExpect: Fast-paced single-day itinerary
Japanese-speaking guide
